title: Reno Direct & Service Requests Report - December 2025
resolved_text:
Memorandum
DATE: January 28, 2026
TO: Mayor and City Council
THROUGH: Jackie Bryant, City Manager
FROM: Cynthia Esparza, Director
Noemi Gomez Martinez, Community Relationships Manager
DEPT: Community Engagement and Services
SUBJECT: December 2025 Reno Direct & Service Requests Report
Monthly reports provide insights into how constituents engage with the City through Reno Direct, the City's centralized customer service center and ServiceNow platform.
Key report highlights include:
• Number of Reno Direct constituent interactions (calls, voicemails, emails, online chats)
• Number of service requests submitted citywide
• Number of service requests closed citywide
• Top five trending service request types citywide
• Top five trending service request types by ward
This information supports Community Engagement and Services' efforts to enhance service delivery while addressing community needs in a responsive and equitable manner.
Attachments:
• December 2025 Service Request Trends & Interaction Report

fields.authors: Cynthia Esparza, Director; Noemi Gomez Martinez, Community Relationships Manager
fields.tldr: The December 2025 Reno Direct report summarizes constituent interactions and service requests processed through the City's centralized customer service center and ServiceNow platform. In December 2025, Reno Direct handled 2,602 total constituent interactions and 2,504 new service requests were submitted citywide, with 2,618 closed. Illegal/abandoned parking was the top service request type both citywide and in every individual ward.
fields.key_stats: Total constituent interactions: 2,602 (1,876 calls answered, 271 voicemails, 436 emails, 19 online chats); New service requests: 2,504; Closed service requests: 2,618; Top citywide request: Parking Illegally/Abandoned (795); Second: Sewer and Stormwater Billing Inquiries (231); Third: Occupied Vehicles (134); Fourth: Graffiti Abatement (98); Fifth: Nuisance, Not Otherwise Listed (87); Largest department by new requests: Reno Police & Parking Enforcement (1,107 new, 1,148 closed).

people: Noemi Gomez Martinez, Community Relationships Manager
